title: Retrieval Review: Custom Properties and Design Tokens
summary: Retrieval Review: Custom Properties and Design Tokens retrieves prior skills in an original changed scopes themes missing values and registrations scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css custom property definition, css custom property cascade, css custom property fallbacks, css design token system, css property registration in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real changed scopes themes missing values and registrations artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Changed scopes themes missing values and registrations case 1: custom properties are replaced before the cascade and never inherit.

Changed scopes themes missing values and registrations case 1: treat --manual-gap and --Manual-gap as the same variable because CSS property names ignore case.
